executives.name: Alyssa Henry
executives.background: Alyssa Henry has been a director since 2020. She was previously CEO of Square (now Block, Inc.) and held leadership roles at Amazon Web Services and Microsoft.

executives.name: David Dorman
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of AT&T Corp. and former Chairman of CVS Health Corporation.

executives.name: Elon Musk
executives.background: Elon Musk has served as our Chief Executive Officer since October 2008 and as a member of the Board since April 2004. He is also the founder and CEO of SpaceX, and the owner and executive chairman of X (formerly Twitter).

executives.name: Frank Yeary
executives.background: Frank D. Yeary has been a director since 2009 and Chairman since January 2023. He is Principal of Darwin Capital Advisors, LLC and was previously Executive Vice Chairman of CamberView Partners, LLC and Vice Chancellor of UC Berkeley.

executives.name: Peggy Alford
executives.background: Executive Vice President, Global Sales at PayPal Holdings, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Alyssa Henry
board_of_directors.background: Alyssa Henry has been a director since 2020. She was previously CEO of Square (now Block, Inc.) and held leadership roles at Amazon Web Services and Microsoft.

board_of_directors.name: Frank Yeary
board_of_directors.background: Frank D. Yeary has been a director since 2009 and Chairman since January 2023. He is Principal of Darwin Capital Advisors, LLC and was previously Executive Vice Chairman of CamberView Partners, LLC and Vice Chancellor of UC Berkeley.

board_of_directors.name: John Donahoe
board_of_directors.background: President and Chief Executive Officer of Nike, Inc. Former CEO of ServiceNow.
